modules.description: A UI window pops up, prompting the user to enter data.

input._manualInputKey: A list of valid keys needs to be provided to the UI.
input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. Execution will resume after waiting for a UI response message.

_result_description.2: failure, timeout or reach maximum retry times

modules.description: Check if the equipment is clean.

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. Execution will resume after waiting for a UI response message.

_result_description.2: failure, timeout or reach maximum retry times

modules._moduleUIName: The UI displays this name to the user, and it must be unique throughout the entire flow.
modules.description: check battery level of the device on a specific USB port

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out).

result_description.0: success, battery level reach target battery level
result_description.1: failure, battery level is not reach target battery level - reach maximum waiting time
result_description.2: failure, no UDID for iOS device, device may not under normal mode
result_description.3: failure, no SN for android device
result_description.4: failure, timeout or reach maximum retry times

modules.description: Read data from Redis based on the input content, and subsequently jump to the target module to resume execution based on the input conditions.

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. If none of the conditions are met, the current process will terminate immediately.

modules.description: Check if the equipment is lock by FMI.

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. This device method may activate it.

_result_description.1: failure, do not get FMI info
_result_description.2: failure, timeout or reach maximum retry times
